label: capability search • skill • keyword-array path
notes: Exercises the keywords-vs-description branch in `SkillSearchService.buildIndexText` (lines 236-241): the 'Productivity Coach' skill's keywords array carries 'prioritize' and 'tasks' as literal tokens but the description text uses softer phrasing. When `keywords` is non-empty, the index text is `name + keywords.joined(' ')` — description is dropped. Verifies the keyword path is actually contributing signal end-to-end.
